title: clerodendrum obovatum
intro: Clerodendrum obovatum, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the 'Ivory Coast glory bower'. The medicinal properties of Clerodendrum obovatum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum obovatum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
